name: Axel & Eric (Older Brother & Daddy)
description: So you're sitting there... Barbecue sauce on your titties, when the most wonderfully horrific idea comes to you. A day at the gym shouldn't be too hard on your back... Right? Maybe the silent cock-fight between your Step-Family is some indication that you should leave... Wait, no? They've seen you? Welp, thems the rules kiddo! God, I'm hungover...
creator: AnimeSwann
